title: Achievement
description: Game Achievement Common Spec v1.0.0 — Achievement definition

uid.description: Globally unique ID. Format: <site_namespace>:ach:<local_id>. local_id may contain ':' for hierarchical IDs (e.g. 'default:cleared:17602').

source_site.description: Origin site URL (optional). Redundant with the namespace prefix of `uid`; included only when a richer URL than the bare domain is needed (e.g. https path with locale).

primary_lang.description: BCP 47 language tag identifying the language of `title`, `description`, `item_refs.title`, `item_refs.maker`. Examples: 'ja', 'en', 'en-US', 'zh-Hant', 'zh-Hans', 'pt-BR', 'es-419'. The `*_i18n` maps provide translations; entries should NOT duplicate the primary language (use `title` etc. for that).

title.description: Game title in the parent Achievement's `primary_lang`. Translations go in `title_i18n`.

title_i18n.description: Optional translations of the game title (e.g. 'ファイナルファンタジーVII' vs 'Final Fantasy VII'). Keys are BCP 47 tags.

platform.description: Platform identifier (uppercase ASCII + digits + underscore, 2-16 chars). Recommended values: PS, PS2, PS3, PS4, PS5, PSP, PSV, NSW, WIIU, WII, GC, N64, SNES, SFC, NES, FC, GB, GBA, GBC, NDS, 3DS, XBOX, X360, XBONE, XBSX, PC, ARC, MD, SAT, DC, PCE, NEOGEO.

maker.description: Maker / publisher in the parent Achievement's `primary_lang`. Translations go in `maker_i18n`.

maker_i18n.description: Optional translations of the maker name (e.g. 'スクウェア' vs 'Square'). Keys are BCP 47 tags.

external_ids.description: Recommended keys: igdb_id, mobygames_id, wikidata_id, ra_game_id, steam_appid, xbox_title_id, psn_np_communication_id. Additional keys are allowed for future / vendor-specific IDs.

title.description: Achievement title in `primary_lang`. Translations go in `title_i18n`.

title_i18n.description: Optional translations of `title`. Keys are BCP 47 language tags (excluding `primary_lang`). Values are translated titles.

description.description: Achievement description in `primary_lang`. Translations go in `description_i18n`.

description_i18n.description: Optional translations of `description`. Keys are BCP 47 language tags (excluding `primary_lang`).

conditions.description: Machine-readable conditions (optional). `type` is a free-form lowercase_snake_case identifier. Recommended values: no_damage, no_death, no_item_use, no_save, time_under, score_over, collect_all, level_under, boss_defeat, chapter_complete, custom.

thumbnail.description: Reference thumbnail (16x16 square, recommended). data_uri only. Identity is verified by sha256 of binary content. For higher-resolution variants use `thumbnails_extra`.

data_uri.description: 16x16 pixel art encoded as base64 data URI. ~1.4KB binary max.

thumbnails_extra.description: Optional additional thumbnail variants at larger sizes (64/128/256/512). Useful when importing from Steam/Xbox/PSN/RetroAchievements where source icons are high-resolution. sha256 identity should still be computed primarily against `thumbnail` (16x16 reference). See README §7.3.

size.description: Edge length in pixels. Square only.

data_uri.description: Base64 data URI. ~55KB binary max per entry. Total payload should stay under ~200KB across all extras.

created_by.description: Handle name (optional). CC0 does not require attribution; use `attribution` field instead when credit is desired.

license.description: SPDX license identifier. Default is CC0-1.0 to maximize portability.
